title: Mildly Smoky Jamaican Tofu Skewers
description: Savory and tender, these vegan-friendly skewers are perfect for a light Jamaican dish, featuring unsalted beef stock and a smoky grill flavor.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together unsalted beef stock, soy sauce, brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated tofu onto the bamboo skewers.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve the skewers hot on a lazy-susan-spinner.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
